connect_banner_never_desc: Link your account to start watching for shifts.
connect_banner_reconnect_desc: Your session expired. Reconnect to keep matches flowing.
onb_step_1_desc: Get a push the moment a Flaschenpost shift matches your rules — no more refreshing the portal.
onb_step_2_desc: We use your refresh token to fetch shifts. Only the encrypted token is stored — never your password. You can do this now or later from Settings.
onb_step_3_desc: Pick the days, times, warehouses, shift length, and advance notice you'd accept. Strict matches ping you; borderline shifts wait quietly on the Devices page.
onb_step_4_desc: Allow push notifications so you actually hear about matches. On iPhone, add Flaschen to your Home Screen first.
onb_step_5_desc: We'll watch quietly in the background. You can replay this tour anytime from the avatar menu.
filters_subtitle: Tell Flaschen what to watch for.
filters_warehouses_subtitle: More appear here as the worker discovers them.
unsaved_desc: You have settings that haven't been saved yet.
filters_watching_hint: Master switch. When off, we stop checking Flaschenpost — no shifts fetched, no notifications.
filters_length_hint: Only notify for shifts within this length range.
filters_advance_hint: Skip shifts that start sooner than this. Useful if you can't drop everything last minute.
home_no_matches: No matches yet. We're checking every few minutes.
home_no_device: Add a device first to test notifications
home_setup_required_sub: Open settings to link your account so we can watch for shifts.
home_reconnect_required_sub: Your session expired. Reconnect to keep getting matches.
home_too_long_sub: Match your time and place but exceed your max length.
settings_polling_hint: When off, we stop checking Flaschenpost — no shifts fetched, no notifications.
settings_schedule_hint: Pick the days and times you'd accept shifts. Multiple slots per day let you skip midday.
settings_special_days_hint: One-off availability. Overrides your weekly schedule for that date.
settings_special_empty: No special days yet. Add one to override your weekly schedule for a specific date.
settings_max_length_hint: Longer shifts that still match your other rules show up in a separate collapsed section on the home page.
settings_kronkorken_hint: Kronkorken (Flaschenpost's internal points) appear next to each shift but don't affect filtering — they're just employer perks.
kronkorken_hint: Internal benefit points — not used for filtering
connect_help_intro: Flaschenpost no longer lets external apps log in with a password. Instead, copy your existing session's refresh token from the portal:
connect_help_step_1: Open portal.flaschenpost.de in another tab and make sure you're logged in.
connect_help_step_2: Open DevTools (F12) → Application → Local Storage → https://portal.flaschenpost.de.
connect_help_step_3: Find the key that starts with oidc.user: and copy its value.
connect_help_step_4: Paste it above. We'll extract the refresh token automatically.
connect_disclaimer: Only the encrypted refresh token is stored on our server. We never see your Flaschenpost password.
devices_subtitle: Choose which devices receive push alerts.
devices_denied: Notifications are blocked. Re-enable them in iOS Settings → Notifications → Flaschen.
devices_unsupported: Web Push needs iOS 16.4+. Install this app to your Home Screen first.
devices_state_on_desc: We're watching for matching shifts and will ping this device.
devices_state_paused_desc: Master switch is off. Turn it back on in Filters to resume.
devices_state_off_desc: Allow push to get a ping when a matching shift appears.
devices_state_connect_desc: Link your account in Settings so we know what shifts to watch for.
devices_state_reconnect_desc: Your Flaschenpost session expired. Reconnect to keep getting matches.
devices_a2hs_title: Add Flaschen to your Home Screen
devices_a2hs_desc: On iPhone, push notifications only work when launched from the Home Screen. Tap Share → Add to Home Screen.
devices_a2hs_emph: add Flaschen to your Home Screen
devices_a2hs_tail: in Safari. iOS only delivers push from installed PWAs.
devices_empty_desc: Add this device to start getting buzzed when a matching shift opens.
ios_install_hint: Tap Share → Add to Home Screen, then open from the Home Screen and enable notifications.
err_invalid_token: That token isn't valid (or has already been rotated). Grab a fresh one from the portal and try again.
match_eyebrow: Last 7 days · would have pinged you
match_hint_warehouse: Pick at least one warehouse to start matching shifts.
match_hint_window: Add a time window to start matching shifts.
match_hint_advance: Long advance notice — you'll only see shifts you can plan ahead.
match_hint_default: Tighten or loosen any rule to see hits change in real time.
filters_weekdays_desc: Tap to toggle. Long-press a day for custom windows.
filters_weekday_hint_strong: Long-press a day for custom windows.
filters_weekday_hint_rest: Flaschenpost is closed Sundays and before 07:00.
filters_time_window_desc: Drag the handles. The grey heatmap shows when shifts usually drop.
filters_density_legend: Darker = more shifts in our last-30-days sample
filters_day_sheet_desc: Override the shared time window for this day only.
devices_state_on_sub: We're checking Flaschenpost roughly every 2 minutes and will ping this device the moment a matching shift drops.
devices_rename_sub: Give this device a recognizable name.
devices_toast_enabled: Push notifications enabled on this device.
devices_toast_test_sent: Test sent — check your lock screen.
settings_quiet_hours_desc: iOS focus modes still apply on top.
dashboard_connect_required_desc: Link your Flaschenpost account in Settings so we can show your roster and matching shifts.
dashboard_reconnect_desc: Your Flaschenpost session expired. Reconnect to keep watching for matches.
dashboard_borderline_desc: Match your time and place but exceed your max length or advance notice.
dashboard_unmatched_desc: Offers from Flaschenpost that don't match your filters. You won't get notified, but you can still grab one if you really need to.
dashboard_empty_desc: We'll buzz you when a matching shift opens.
dashboard_taken_desc: {warehouse} on {date} is no longer offered. Push notifications can lag a few seconds behind the live API.
dashboard_fetch_failed: Couldn't reach Flaschenpost just now — showing the last result we have.
dashboard_accept_soon_title: Accept-shift API isn't wired up yet
dashboard_toast_accept_stub: Accept-shift API coming soon — manual accept lands once we know the endpoint shape.
